Module 1: Circle of Awesome
!
Executive Summary
The Circle of Awesome is…awesome! You must begin thinking in terms of
sequences of launches, and not just your one initial launch.
The thing is, joint venture (JV) launches can make a lot of money because
you’re tapping into other people’s lists. However, you don’t want your first
launch to be a JV launch.
You definitely want to test your launch content before they mail for you. You
want to make sure that your partners will be successful and will continue to
work with you
Start with an Internal Launch
• 	Figure out your offer, prelaunch content, sequences, etc.
• 	Ex: You have a list of 1,000 people and you make $20,000 with your
internal launch
With solid data and numbers it will be a lot easier to attract a JV partner
and persuade them to work with you. When you do your internal launch
you use your sideways sales letter and prelaunch content.Then you can
easily move to the JV Launch.
!
1	© 2014 Internet Alchemy, Inc.

-- 1 of 3 --

For the JV launch you can (and should) use the same launch content
because it’s proven and the sequence is tested.
• 	Ex: If 5 other partners mail for you and your total audience increases
to 6,000 people, you will make $120,000 (this is based on the
numbers above and is just a random example and there are no
income claims/guarantees)
Between these two launches you will have received a ton of content
(launch conversation). You’ll receive the most feedback after you’ve
delivered your product, and your customers will tell you exactly what they
want to see from you next.
You will then continue around the Circle of Awesome and create your next
product based on your customer feedback.
• 	Ex: You now have a list of 6,000 people to use for your internal launch,
and could potentially make more per subscriber because you’ve learned
from your first launch
As the Circle of Awesome continues, your list size continues to increase
and your JV’s and affiliates become loyal partners who look forward to
promoting your launches.
If you are just starting out and don’t have an initial list (like in the example),
you’ll use a seed launch.
!
!
!
2	© 2014 Internet Alchemy, Inc.

-- 2 of 3 --

Module 1 Homework
Write down your launch goals
Asset Identification - go through the complete list and identify what you
have.
List the top three places where you can build your assets quickly
Your Avatar - answer all the questions about your avatar so you get a
crystal clear picture of your avatar
Take a first pass at your Product Launch Hero’s Journey
Remember: This is about progress, not perfection!
!
